PowerShell($m = \(Get-Content e:\\pythonproiect\\main.py | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; $a = \(Get-Content e:\\pythonproiect\\app.py | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "main.py: $m lines"; Write-Output "app.py: $a lines")

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Title match: $\($r.Content -match '登录'\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Redirect \(login required\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/leaderboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Leaderboard: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/honor" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Honor redirect: $\($r.StatusCode\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '' } | Stop-Process -Force)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "score_server status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "score_server 未启动: $_" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/leaderboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Web: OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Web error: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "Score: OK $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Score error: $_" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; $tests = @\(\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $tests += "login: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $tests += "login: ERR" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/leaderboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $tests += "leaderboard: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $tests += "leaderboard: ERR" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/calendar" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $tests += "calendar: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $tests += "calendar: ERR" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $tests += "score_server: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { $tests += "score_server: ERR" }; $tests)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/calendar" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 10; Write-Output "calendar status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "calendar: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/calendar" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 10; Write-Output "calendar: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "calendar err: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ \)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/delete_account" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 10; Write-Output "delete: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "delete err: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; $ok = 0; $err = 0; @\("/login", "/leaderboard", "/calendar", "/stats", "/honor", "/about", "/delete_account"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 10; Write-Output "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) $_"; $ok++ } catch { Write-Output "ERR $_"; $err++ } }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Passed: $ok, Failed: $err")

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/about" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -MaximumRedirection 10; Write-Output "about: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "about err: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Web 界面: $\($r1.StatusCode\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "排行榜服务: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "========================================"; Write-Output "  http://127.0.0.1:5000/  已就绪"; Write-Output "========================================")

PowerShell($body = @{username='testuser';password='123456'} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -SessionVariable sess; Write-Output "Login: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "Login failed" }; $pomo = @{task_id='test123';start_time=\(Get-Date\).ToString\('o'\)} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/pomodoro/complete" -Method POST -Body $pomo -ContentType "application/json" -WebSession $sess; Write-Output "Pomodoro: $\($r2 | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "Pomodoro failed: $_" })

PowerShell(cd e:\\pythonproiect; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "web_app.py" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 4; $session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $loginBody = "username=test999&password=123456&action=register"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -WebSession $session; Write-Output "Login OK: $\($r -match '任务工作台'\)"} catch { Write-Output "Login failed"; $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode })

PowerShell($s = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -Method POST -Body "username=test999&password=123456&action=login" -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -WebSession $s | Out-Null; $tasks = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/tasks?view=completed" -WebSession $s; Write-Output "Completed tasks: $\($tasks.tasks.Count\)"; $tasks.tasks | Select-Object title, completed_pomodoros, target_pomodoros, cost_display | Format-Table)

PowerShell($s = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/login" -Method POST -Body "username=test999&password=123456&action=login" -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -WebSession $s | Out-Null; $p = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/plant" -WebSession $s; Write-Output "Plant: stage=$\($p.plant.stage_name\) growth=$\($p.plant.growth\) water=$\($p.plant.water\)%"; $w = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/plant/water" -Method POST -WebSession $s; Write-Output "Water: $\($w.msg\) new_growth=$\($w.plant.growth\)"; $f = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/plant/fertilize" -Method POST -WebSession $s; Write-Output "Fertilize: $\($f.msg\) new_growth=$\($f.plant.growth\)"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/plant/test999" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "View other: $\($r.StatusCode\)")
